tax_bands.title: Spain IRPF — general progressive scale (2024/25, simplified)
tax_bands.source: Ley 35/2006 (IRPF), state general scale; personal minimum applied as an allowance (simplified)
tax_bands.method: taxable = worldwide income − personal minimum; statutory IRPF brackets applied from 0.
tax_bands.note: Rough band approximation, not the Spanish statutory calculation. Spain applies the personal minimum as a bracket-bottom credit, has separate savings-income rates and regional (autonomous-community) scales; this simplified model excludes those, deductions and social security.

tax_bands.title: UK Income Tax — rates and bands (2024/25, rest-of-UK)
tax_bands.source: HMRC Income Tax rates and Personal Allowance (excludes Scotland)
tax_bands.method: taxable = income − personal allowance; rest-of-UK main rates applied from 0.
tax_bands.note: Excludes the personal-allowance taper above £100,000, Scottish rates, dividend/savings allowances, National Insurance and reliefs.

tax_bands.title: Germany Einkommensteuer — progressive zones (2024, coarse approximation)
tax_bands.source: §32a EStG progressive formula, approximated by coarse marginal bands
tax_bands.method: taxable = income − Grundfreibetrag; the §32a progressive zones approximated by coarse marginal bands.
tax_bands.note: Coarse approximation of the §32a EStG progressive formula (which is a continuous polynomial, not flat brackets). Excludes the solidarity surcharge, church tax, joint assessment (Splitting) and deductions.
